examples: Grable has mastered the interdisciplinary approach to teaching that we've been talking about in class.
It was a fun study to do because it was so interdisciplinary.
[align=left]This interdisciplinary approach was backed up by an obsessive attention to detail.
The event explored the importance of an interdisciplinary catchment based approach to managing and protecting water resources.
Interdisciplinary training or experience crossing the natural sciences and the social sciences fields would be an important asset.
